---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve DYDYD
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots / Screen Recordings

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Device:** [e.g., iPhone 15 Pro, Pixel 8, iOS Simulator]
- **OS Version:** [e.g., iOS 18.1, Android 15]
- **App Version:** [e.g., v0.3.2]
- **Build Profile:** [e.g., development, preview, production]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. Include relevant log output, error messages, or stack traces.

## Workspace Affected

- [ ] Backend (`@dydyd/backend`)
- [ ] Mobile (`@dydyd/mobile`)
- [ ] Shared (`@dydyd/shared`)
- [ ] CI/Infrastructure
